title: Department Manager Vacancy at Health & Glow Global Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Health & Glow Global Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Health & Glow Global Group in Bhubaneswar is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Health & Glow Global Group:
Health & Glow Global Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in CRM

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow Global Group!
